arts.ttl: Louie Barry to Derby County latest as Aston Villa issue transfer update
arts.sum: Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone. Derby County hopes of landing in-demand Louie Barry on loan as they seek more firepower are up in the air after the latest comments on a deal out of Aston Villa.
